allow: Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const d=await p.user.count\({where:{role:'\\''EXECUTIVE'\\'',districtName:'\\''Hyderabad District'\\'',isActive:true,executiveType:'\\''DELIVERY'\\''}}\);const l=await p.user.count\({where:{role:'\\''EXECUTIVE'\\'',districtName:'\\''Hyderabad District'\\'',isActive:true,NOT:{executiveType:'\\''DELIVERY'\\''}}}\);console.log\('\\''Delivery partners:'\\'',d,'\\''| Listing execs:'\\'',l\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\);')

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{n='Process';e={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 25528 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "STILL IN USE by PID $\($still.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 5000 is now FREE" })
